title: inventory.session.review
description: Session-scoped wrapper around lifecycle.transition (spec 002) for the Inventory surface. Pre-fills entityType based on the session kind resolved server-side from sessionId. Returns a status-discriminated response: success (transition applied), noop (state unchanged, no audit entry), or error.

ResolvedEntityType.description: Resolved server-side from sessionId; included in the response so audit correlation is unambiguous.

SessionState.description: Canonical spec 002 six-value session state. Used for both nextState (request) and newState/priorState (response). No presentational projection.

message.description: Human-readable explanation. MUST NOT include absolute filesystem paths or secrets.

details.description: Optional structured detail. Examples: { allowedNextStates: [...] } for transition.refused; { sourceState: 'missing' } for source.unavailable; {} for session.mixed_state (user must split via spec 005 reclassify).

Request.description: Request envelope for inventory.session.review. Caller supplies the session id and target canonical state; the server resolves the entityType and delegates to lifecycle.transition.

nextState.description: Canonical spec 002 session state to transition to. When nextState equals current state, the response is status='noop' (no audit entry, no error). The state.unchanged error code is not used.

actionLabel.description: Human-readable label recorded on the audit entry (e.g. 'Confirmed', 'Re-opened review', 'Rejected session').

Response.description: Response envelope for inventory.session.review. Status is 'success' (transition applied), 'noop' (no change needed, no audit entry), or 'error'.
